# InfraMosaic — Complaints-Handling Policy

**Policy version:** 1.0 · **as_of:** 2026-06-13 · **Framework:** IOSCO PRA principles + ISAE 3000  
**Generated by** `build/build_assurance.py` — version-stamped; update by editing the generator, not this file.

---

## 1. Scope

This policy governs complaints about any **published InfraMosaic figure** — a headline KPI, a per-company IMES exposure score, an assessed component price, a BOM or cost-curve point, or any cited claim — and about the **methodology** that produced it. It implements the IOSCO PRA *complaints handling + records* principle.

## 2. How to lodge a complaint

A complainant may challenge a figure on grounds of factual error, methodology misapplication, stale input, or conflict of interest. A complaint should identify the `figure_id` (as published in `ledger/publication_ledger.json`), the `content_hash` of the record being challenged, and the basis of the challenge.

## 3. Service levels (SLA)

| Stage | Target |
|---|---|
| Acknowledgement | 2 business days |
| Substantive response | 10 business days |
| Resolution (uphold / reject / restate) | 20 business days |

## 4. Escalation

An unresolved or rejected complaint may be escalated to the Methodology Owner and, where one exists, to the independent review committee. Escalation outcomes are recorded.

## 5. Link to the corrections log

An **upheld** complaint that changes a published figure is recorded as an append-only entry in `ledger/corrections_log.json` (see `docs/CORRECTIONS_LOG.md` and `docs/CORRECTIONS_POLICY.md`). Each entry pins the `superseded_content_hash` of the corrected record, the reason, the correction class, and who corrected / approved it — so the restatement is tamper-evident and traceable back to the complaint.

## 6. Records & retention

All complaints and their outcomes are retained for a **minimum of 5 years** (see `docs/policies/RETENTION_SCHEDULE.md`), mirroring disclosed PRA practice. The corrections log and the ledger hash chain make upheld-complaint restatements permanently auditable.

## 7. Honest status

This policy is **documented and the corrections-log substrate exists**, but the complaints **intake channel is not yet operationally staffed** and the corrections log is seeded with an illustrative example only. The control matrix records this principle as **PARTIAL**.
